# Fuzzy Logic

**Summary**: A form of many-valued logic; it deals with approximate reasoning rather than fixed and exact feedback.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2020-abdallah|Abdallah, 2020]] used fuzzy-logic to handle uncertainty in the modeling and prediction of reservoir parameters.

## Key Results and Findings

- Fuzzy logic offered the best estimation of permeability in comparison to other methods like multilinear regression. ([[2020-abdallah|Abdallah, 2020, p. 32]])
